detectors.description:
Reentrancy in JustAToken._transfer(address,address,uint256) (JustAToken.sol#725-857):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (JustAToken.sol#797)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (JustAToken.sol#871-883)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (JustAToken.sol#803)
		- _developmentAddress.transfer(amount.div(2)) (JustAToken.sol#891)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount.div(2)) (JustAToken.sol#893)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (JustAToken.sol#855)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (JustAToken.sol#1021)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (JustAToken.sol#1001)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (JustAToken.sol#1003)
	JustAToken._rOwned (JustAToken.sol#361) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- JustAToken._takeTeam(uint256) (JustAToken.sol#1015-1023)
	- JustAToken._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (JustAToken.sol#975-1011)
	- JustAToken.balanceOf(address) (JustAToken.sol#551-555)
	- JustAToken.constructor() (JustAToken.sol#459-515)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (JustAToken.sol#855)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (JustAToken.sol#1029)
	JustAToken._rTotal (JustAToken.sol#373) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- JustAToken._getCurrentSupply() (JustAToken.sol#1179-1191)
	- JustAToken._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (JustAToken.sol#1027-1033)
	- JustAToken.constructor() (JustAToken.sol#459-515)
	- JustAToken.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (JustAToken.sol#647-669)
